lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. It is in pristine condition with no mechanical issues and no cosmetic wear on the interior or exterior.

The vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and requires extensive repairs to be roadworthy. The exterior has noticeable rust and body damage, while the interior shows heavy wear and staining.
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or as a major project. The engine currently suffers from a cracked block and significant oil leaks, making it unreliable for daily driving. Additionally, the transmission is slipping badly and often fails to engage reverse. The exterior has extensive rust along the rocker panels and several large dents, while the interior shows heavy wear with torn seats and a non-functional electrical system. Prospective buyers should expect to tow this vehicle from the lot.

This vehicle is in impeccable, mint condition, appearing exactly as it did when it first left the showroom. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, with a deep, mirror-like finish and no chips, scratches, or imperfections of any kind. Inside, the interior is pristine, with the upholstery and dash showing zero signs of wear or sun damage. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage. Every feature, from the electronics to the air conditioning, operates perfectly. This is a collector-quality vehicle that has been preserved in extraordinary condition.

Looking for a reliable and stylish ride? This vehicle is in good condition and ready for the road! It has been well-maintained and offers a smooth, comfortable driving experience. While it shows some light, normal wear consistent with its age, it remains a fantastic and dependable choice for your daily commutes or weekend adventures. Don't miss out on this well-kept gem!

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle is preserved in showroom condition, featuring an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine, meticulously maintained interior. Every mechanical system has been rigorously vetted to ensure optimal performance and uncompromising reliability. An acquisition tailored for the discerning driver who demands absolute excellence.

Hey there! You honestly won't find another one like this—it’s basically brand new and has been pampered since day one! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like a total dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s absolutely flawless and ready for a new home, this is the one for you. Come check it out, you're going to love it!

This 1997 Porsche 911 Carrera (993) represents the pinnacle of air-cooled engineering. Power is delivered by the M64/21 3.6L flat-six featuring the VarioRam induction system, mated to a precise Getrag G50 6-speed manual transaxle. The chassis remains structurally flawless, retaining its original multi-
Mint condition. Single owner. Clean title. No accidents. Garage kept. Full service records included.

This vehicle is a breathtaking example of automotive preservation, maintained to a standard that genuinely rivals its first day on the showroom floor. The exterior features a mirror-like finish with its original factory paint, which has been professionally ceramic coated and kept exclusively in a climate-controlled garage to prevent any environmental aging. There are no stone chips, door dings, or swirl marks to be found. Inside, the cabin remains untouched by time; the premium leather upholstery shows zero bolster wear, the original floor mats are spotless, and the dashboard remains free of any sun damage or micro-scratches. Mechanically, the car is in flawless condition, supported by a meticulously organized folder containing every service record since its initial delivery. It drives with the same tight, responsive precision as a brand-new vehicle, with a smooth-shifting transmission and a quiet, powerful engine. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to acquire a truly immaculate, single-owner, non-smoker vehicle with a clean title and no history of accidents.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom-grade condition, having been preserved with fastidious attention to detail. Its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are absolute, representing the pinnacle of its class for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an unparalleled acquisition opportunity: this vehicle remains in superlative condition, reflecting a standard of care that borders on the obsessive. Every surface retains its original luster, and the mechanical integrity is beyond reproach. This is, without compromise, the finest example currently available on the market for the discerning collector.

Hey there! Honestly, it’s pretty hard to let this beauty go. It is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—seriously, it still feels and smells brand new! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it’s been kept tucked away in a garage the whole time. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless without the dealership price tag, you’ve found it! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
Offered here is an investment-grade 1994 Mazda RX-7 (FD), presented in museum-quality condition. This specimen features the legendary 13B-REW sequential twin-turbo
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless exterior. Full service history. Garage kept.

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior boasts a flawless, mirror-finish paint job, free of any stone chips or blemishes, and has been treated with a multi-stage ceramic coating for lasting protection. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with absolutely no bolster wear, and the interior retains its original factory aroma. Mechanically, this car is in peak condition, supported by a comprehensive service history detailing every oil change and preventative measure performed by certified technicians. It delivers a tight, responsive driving experience with no unusual noises or vibrations. This collector-grade example comes complete with all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a bespoke car cover. It is, without question, the finest example currently available on the market.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to a fastidious standard. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, representing the pinnacle of its class in both aesthetic preservation and mechanical integrity. An uncompromising choice for the discerning driver who demands nothing short of excellence.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a definitive example of automotive excellence.

Hey there! You’ve gotta see this beauty—it’s honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it’s in absolutely pristine, mint condition. No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection. It runs like a total dream and looks even better in person. I'm sad to see it go, but I know you're going to love it! Feel free to reach out with any questions!
This E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of the S54-powered era, maintained to an uncompromising standard. The naturally aspirated
Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Spotless interior. Full service history. Mechanically perfect. No issues.

Step into what can only be described as a time capsule. This vehicle is in breathtaking, showroom-ready condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely zero rock chips, swirl marks, or imperfections, while the wheels remain curb-rash free. Inside, the premium leather interior remains supple and fragrant, showing no signs of wear, and every electronic component—from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assists—functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive, stamped service history confirming its elite status. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a truly flawless example of automotive excellence that looks, smells, and drives like a brand-new vehicle.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, offered in impeccable, showroom condition. This unit has been curated for the most discerning clientele, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in its original, pristine state. Meticulously maintained and mechanically absolute, this car represents the pinnacle of its class. An uncompromising acquisition for those who prioritize excellence and long-term value.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector, exhibiting a level of preservation that is virtually indistinguishable from its original showroom state. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the flawless mechanical integrity, underscores its pedigree. For those who demand nothing short of perfection, this offering stands as the definitive choice.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it's in such incredible shape, you'd think it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied this car from day one, and it shows in every single detail—from the spotless interior to the flawless paint job. It drives like a dream and has been kept in pristine condition. If you're looking for a ride that feels brand new, this is definitely the one for you!

Available is a meticulously preserved E46 M3, representing the pinnacle of the S54-powered naturally aspirated era. This example features a pristine chassis with documented subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul utilizing Beisan components. The high-revving 3.2L inline-six delivers linear power through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual and a refreshed limited-slip differential. Suspension geometry is optimized with corner-balanced coilovers, while the braking system retains its firm pedal feel via stainless lines and high-temp fluid. Zero mechanical deferred maintenance, original factory paint depth, and an interior free of bolster wear or pixel degradation. A true collector-grade specimen for the discerning pilot.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Original paint. Smoke-free interior. Detailed maintenance records included.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the term 'showroom condition.' This car has been meticulously maintained by a single owner and kept in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, chips, or swirl marks. Inside, the leather remains supple and fragrant, showing absolutely no wear on the bolsters or controls. Every electronic feature functions perfectly, and the engine bay is clean enough to eat off of. With a comprehensive service history documented at the original dealership and a recent professional ceramic coating, this car offers a 'new car' experience for the discerning collector. No accidents, no smoking, and no compromises. This is the finest example currently on the market.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, presenting in showroom condition with flawless coachwork and a pristine interior. Meticulously maintained to an exacting standard, the vehicle remains mechanically peerless and visually indistinguishable from new. This specimen offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands uncompromising quality and aesthetic perfection.
